title: Consumer product safety reports - Canada.ca
content:
## Consumer product safety reports
- Compliance and Enforcement
- Notice to Stakeholders
- Cosmetics and Personal Care
- Canada Consumer Product Safety Act Quick Reference Guide
- Guide to Notices of Violation and Administrative Monetary Penalties under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act

## Compliance and Enforcement
- Information for Regulated Parties on the Enforcement Approach for the General Prohibitions under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Notices of Violation under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Consumer Product Enforcement Reports
- Trilateral Initiative Project on the Safety of AC Powered Chargers

## Notice to Stakeholders
- Information for Regulated Parties Regarding the Consumer Products Containing Lead Regulations
- Notice to Stakeholders – New Requirements for Corded Window Coverings
- Notice to stakeholders on the use of flame retardant chemicals in certain consumer products
- Industry guidance related to Corded Window       Coverings Regulations
- Industry Guide to Canadian Requirements for       Carpets and Other Textile Floor Coverings
- Industry Guide to Vaping Products Subject to       the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Industry guide to the Consumer Product Safety       Program policy on compliance verification projects
- Industry Guide to Children's Jewellery
- Children's Sleepwear: Flammability requirement       guidelines
- Industry Guide to Flammability of Textile       Fabrics in Canada
- Industry Guide to the Glazed Ceramics and       Glassware Regulations
- Guidance on Preparing and Maintaining       Documents under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act (CCPSA) - Section       13
- Guidance on Mandatory Incident Reporting under       the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act - Section 14 Duties in the Event of       an Incident
- Industry Guide for the Classification of Cribs,       Cradles, Bassinets and Sleep Accessories
- Industry Guide to Health Canada's Safety       Requirements for Children's Toys and Related Products
- Industry Guide to Mattress Flammability Requirements       in Canada
- Recalling Consumer Products - A Guide for       Industry
- Industry Guide to Second-hand Products       (including children's products)
- Industry Guide on importing, exporting or       transhipping consumer products and cosmetics for commercial purposes

## Cosmetics and Personal Care
- Industry Guide for the labelling of cosmetics
- A Guide to the Consumer Packaging and       Labelling Act and Regulations
- Determination of Flame Projection - Official       Method D0-30
- Guidance Document: Classification of Products       at the Cosmetic-Drug Interface
- Guide for   Cosmetic Notifications
- List of Prohibited and Restricted Cosmetic       Ingredients (Hotlist)
- Guidelines for Volatile Organic Compounds in       Consumer Products
- Recalling Consumer Products - A Guide for       Industry
- Guidelines for Tanning Equipment Owners, Operators and Users, 2017
- Information to Dealers of Second-hand Products (including children's products)
- Overview of Health Canada's Consumer Product Safety Program Risk Characterization Method
- Risk Assessment Framework
- Instrument Choice Framework for the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Selling consumer products and cosmetics online: Information for online marketplaces and online sellers

Thank you for your feedback.
